description: You are the Information Security Officer at Summit Regional Medical Center, a 350-bed acute care hospital that handles protected health information (PHI) daily. Following a mandatory HIPAA risk analysis, formalize the risk management program in Eramba (credentials at /home/ga/eramba/credentials.txt) by creating five new risks covering distinct HIPAA threat categories (unauthorized PHI access, ransomware, improper disposal, third-party breach, and accidental disclosure) with assigned treatment strategies. You must also establish three new internal controls (Security Services) addressing these risks, an approved security policy titled 'HIPAA Security Rule Compliance Policy', a project with 'HIPAA' in the title to track remediation, and two policy exceptions with planned expiration dates for deferred compliance areas. All additions must be new records beyond those already present in the GRC program.
